dan-dan-noodles.name: Dan Dan Noodles
instructions: Fill a large pot with lightly salted water and bring to a rapid boil. Cook egg noodles at a boil until tender yet firm to the bite, 7 to 9 minutes. Drain in a colander over a bowl, reserving 3/4 cup cooking liquid. Place noodles in a large bowl.
Heat oil in a large wok over medium-high heat. Add peanuts to pan; saute until fragrant, about 2 minutes. Remove from heat; cool slightly.
Combine peanuts, soy sauce, sambal oelek, sugar, garlic, and ginger in a mini food chopper; process until finely ground.

Cook pork and salt in a wok over medium-high heat until no longer pink, stirring to crumble, about 8 minutes. Add peanut mixture and 3/4 cup cooking liquid to pork; bring to a boil. Cook for 1 minute, stirring frequently.
Add pork mixture, cucumber, green onions, cilantro, and lime juice to noodles; toss well. Serve.

dark-chocolate-and-date-cookies.name: Dark Chocolate And Date Cookies
instructions: Heat the oven to 177°C and line a baking tray with baking paper.
Mix together all the dry ingredients in a small bowl (including the dates and the chocolate). In a separate small bowl, mix together all the wet ingredients.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until combined.
Drop spoonfuls of the cookie dough onto the baking tray.
Bake in the oven for 11 minutes and let the biscuits cool for 1 minute on the tray before moving to a wire rack to cool completely.
Serve.
Enjoy!

delicious-and-creamy-dulce-de-leche-come.name: Delicious And Creamy Dulce De Leche
delicious-and-creamy-dulce-de-leche-come.original_name: Delicioso y cremoso dulce de leche hecho en casa

ingredients.item: 1 cdita de extracto natural de vainilla
1 cda of milk cream (optional for more sedative finish)

instructions: It warmes milk into a large bottom pot with medium heat, preferably stainless steel or copper, to ensure a uniform cooking.
Add white and brown sugar, stirring constantly until completely dissolved and milk takes a slightly golden tone.
Solve the sodium bicarbonate into a tablespoon of hot water and scour it slowly into the mixture. You'll notice that milk will moist, it's normal and helps avoid cutting.
It minimizes fire and keeps cooking slowly, stirring every few minutes with a wooden spoon or Silicone Spatula to avoid stick to the bottom.
It incorporates the vanilla, pint of salt and honey, that will enhance the taste and bring a natural shine to the sweet.
Cooking for 60 to 80 minutes, keeping a slow and constant cooking. The mixture will be progressively reduced and thickened.
When the sweet gets an intense amber and creamy texture, remove the pot from the fire. If you prefer a smoother version, add a tablespoon of milk and mix cream to fully integrate.
Deja enfriar a temperatura ambiente hasta que alcance una consistencia densa pero untuosa.
Keep the milk sweet in sterilized glass bottles, close them well and refrigerate them. It can be preserved up to three weeks with its taste and color intact.

delicious-cheeks-with-vegetables-step-by.name: Delicious Cheeks With Vegetables Step By Step
delicious-cheeks-with-vegetables-step-by.original_name: Deliciosas carrilleras con verduras paso a paso

ingredients.item: 1 kg de carrillera de cerdo o ternera

instructions: Vamos a iniciar nuestra receta, cociendo la carrillera.
To get us soft, we're gonna cook her up in a pressure pot for 35 minutes. If you don't have one, do it in a slow cook pot for about 2 hours till it's soft.
When your flesh's soft, you'll remove it from the pot and let them cool and cut them into pieces. Reserve.
Warm up a jug with oil and you'll have to drink garlic and onion. Jumps till sealed.
When the onion and garlic are clear, you're going to have the pimenton and you're going to have a low breath.
En este punto, agrega las cucharadas soperas del tomate frito, mezcla y cocina a fuego lento por 3 minutos.
Corta las zanahorias en rodajas delgadas e incorpora. Condimenta con sal y pimienta al gusto, mezcla hasta integrar.
It proceeds to add the pieces of rails with two cups of broth where the flesh was boiling.
Let cook for 20 minutes on low heat. A few minutes later, you'll add his mushrooms and peas to cook them.
Pasado ese tiempo, tu carne debe estar bien cocida y el guiso muy jugoso.
Apaga y sirve con tus guarniciones favoritas.
Enjoy!

delicious-gelatin-with-coffee-with-milk-.name: Delicious Gelatin With Coffee With Milk
delicious-gelatin-with-coffee-with-milk-.original_name: Deliciosa gelatina con café con leche
instructions: It starts the recipe and adds water into a medium bowl and incorporates the granetin sheets.
Deja reposar por 10 minutos aproximadamente.
En una olla grande, vierte la leche entera, la leche condensada y la leche evaporada. Mezcla y deja cocinar por 7 minutos sin dejar de mezclar.
It later incorporates the two tablespoons of soluble coffee. Mix to integrate and dissolve. Before it boils, remove from the fire
Drain the Grenetin and add into the pot with hot milks. Mix well till all ingredients are integrated.
Deja enfriar tu mezcla y posteriormente vierte en un bolde mediano o grande. Refrigera por aproximadamente 5 horas o hasta que cuaje.
Once curved, cut into portions and enjoy!

delicious-rested-oats-with-rice-pudding-.name: Delicious Rested Oats With Rice Pudding Flavor
delicious-rested-oats-with-rice-pudding-.original_name: Deliciosa avena reposada con sabor de arroz con leche

ingredients.item: 1 taza de hojuelas de avena tradicional
1 cm of vegetable or animal milk (almond, oatmeal, rice or coconut without added sugar)
1 / 3 cup of natural or Greek yogurt without sugar ((optional for increased creaminess))
2 cds of chia seed ((help to weigh))
1 ½ cds of agave or minced date honey ((you can suit your taste))
½ lemon or orange (optional but delicious citrus)
1 cda de pasas  ((opcional, como en el arroz con leche tradicional))
Canela en rama y clavo  ((opcional para infusionar la leche antes de mezclar))

instructions: If you wish a more intense and true flavour, boil vegetable milk with a cinnamon and 1 nail for 5 minutes with low heat. Let completely cool before using.
In an hermetic bottle or vessel, mix oatmeal, chia seeds, milk (already cold and cold), cinnamon powder, agave honey or dates, vanilla essence and pint of salt.
Add the yogurt and remove till everything's well integrated.
Incorporates raisins and fringes of lemon or orange. Remix.
Tapa el recipiente y refrigera por al menos 6 horas, preferiblemente toda la noche.
The next day, she moves with a spoon. If it's too thick, you can add some more milk.
It serves cold, decorated with toppings of your choice.

dible-bean-rice-lezzet.name: Dible Bean Rice
instructions: 1. Beard fresh beans cuçgrain parçcan be eaten in the form of beer.
2. Stick the bark to the bark of the onion.
3. By taking half of the beans into the saucepan, add onion, rice, grated tomato, salt and pepper.
4. After adding the remaining beans, add water and butter and cook the cover on the jealous fire in its steam.
5. After receiving the meal service plate, visit the heated nuts oil in the pan.

dill-chicken-paillards-with-tomato-dill-.name: Dill Chicken Paillards With Tomato-dill Relish
instructions: Prepare grill for direct-heat cooking over hot charcoal (medium-high heat for gas); see Grilling Procedure .
Pound chicken 1/4 inch thick between 2 sheets of plastic wrap with flat side of a meat pounder or with a rolling pin.

Whisk together oil, dill, shallot, mustard, and vinegar in a large bowl. Set aside 1/4 cup. Sprinkle chicken evenly with 1 teaspoon salt and 1/2 teaspoon pepper, then add to dill mixture, turning to coat.
Toss tomatoes with reserved dill mixture and 1/4 teaspoon each of salt and pepper.
Grill chicken, turning once, until just cooked through, 3 to 4 minutes total. Serve topped with relish.

dinner-salad-with-radicchio-and-potatoes.name: Dinner Salad With Radicchio And Potatoes
instructions: Blend cashews, oil, vinegar, red pepper flakes, fish sauce, honey, garlic, and ⅓ cup warm water in a blender until very creamy, smooth, and pourable. Taste dressing and season with salt.
Do Ahead: Dressing can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and chill.

Place a rack in middle of oven; preheat to 425°. Place sweet potatoes on a rimmed baking sheet, drizzle with oil, and season with kosher salt; turn to coat. Arrange cut side down; roast until tender and cut sides are browned, 20–25 minutes. Let cool.
Bring a medium pot of water to a boil. Carefully lower eggs into water and cook 8 minutes. Transfer eggs to a bowl of ice water and let cool. Remove eggs from ice water, pat dry, and peel.

Toss radicchio, fennel, and vinegar in a large bowl; season with sea salt. Drizzle ½ cup dressing down sides of bowl. Using your hands, fold salad, working from the bottom out toward the sides of the bowl, until evenly coated in dressing.

Transfer salad to a platter. Tear sweet potatoes and eggs into 1½" pieces and nestle into salad. Season egg yolks with sea salt. Drizzle more dressing over and top with cashews and cilantro. Serve with remaining dressing alongside.

djs-sliders.name: Dj's Sliders
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Combine Cheddar cheese and mayonnaise; refrigerate.
Mix ground beef, salt, pepper, Creole seasoning, onion powder, and garlic powder together. Form mixture into 12 slider patties; place on a baking sheet.

Bake patties in the preheated oven, flipping once, for about 15 minutes. Remove from oven and top each patty with 1 tablespoon of the cheese-mayonnaise mixture. Continue baking until cheese has melted, 1 to 2 minutes more. Serve on slider buns.

dobos-torte.name: Dobos Torte
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (205 degrees C). Have ready two 10-inch cardboard circles. Generously grease a 9-inch springform pan with some of the soft butter, and dust with flour.
To make the cake layers: Beat egg whites in a clean glass bowl with an electric mixer until frothy; gradually add 1 cup sugar. Continue to beat just until soft peaks form.
Beat yolks, milk, lemon zest, vanilla, and salt together in a separate bowl until lighter in color; fold mixture into egg whites. Sift flour over egg mixture, and fold in.

Spread 1 1⁄3 cups cake batter into the prepared pan. Bake in the preheated oven until small, brown spots begin to appear on cake, about 5 to 9 minutes. Remove cake from the oven, and remove layer from pan with a spatula. Dust cake lightly with flour, and place on a rack to cool. Grease pan again, and repeat this process until all of the cake batter is used, about 6 times more. Place the layers between wax paper, and cover with a towel. Chill cake layers for a few hours.

To make the chocolate buttercream: Beat butter and 1/4 cup cocoa powder together in a bowl with an electric mixer on low until light and fluffy. Gradually add milk, remaining 1/4 cup cocoa powder, and vanilla extract; beat until smooth. Add confectioners' sugar, about 2 tablespoons at a time, until desired consistency is reached.

Layer the chilled layers on one of the cardboard rounds with the buttercream. Start with one layer; cover with the buttercream, and then press down with another layer to make a good seal. Repeat this with the remaining layers, but reserve one layer. Wrap the cake in plastic, and chill for at least 6 hours along with the remaining buttercream. Grease the other cardboard round with the shortening, and place the last layer on it.

To make the caramel: Place 1 cup sugar into a non-stick skillet over medium heat. Allow sugar to cook until the edges look melted and brown. Begin stirring with a wooden spoon. Cook until the sugar become an amber color, and is smooth. Carefully pour the caramel over the top of the last layer, and spread to the edges with an oiled knife. Quickly, using an oiled knife, indent the top of the caramel into 16 wedges. Allow to cool slightly, and then retouch the indents with the knife again. Place layer onto a counter top dusted with sugar, and allow the caramel to cool completely.
Place some more buttercream on top of the chilled torte, and top with the caramel round. Frost the sides with the remaining buttercream. Chill the torte before serving.
